steps.title: Match hoaxes to their label
steps.content: The blank describes fictitious Wikipedia entries that began as jokes by mischievous users and were later deleted. The word must mean deceptive jokes rather than useful or truthful material.

steps.title: Reject mismatched nouns
steps.content: A means improvements, C means truthful disclosures, and D means examinations. The context calls the entries hoaxes perpetrated as jokes, so a word for tricks fits. The answer is B.
